content.text: {"component":"paying","summary":"Paying reads as a Symfony-oriented payment lifecycle and operations component with strong documentation, multi-tier testing, and mature local ops tooling; primary gap is visible CI/CD automation in-repo.","strengths":["Clear payment lifecycle identity and scope documented","Rich docs set (architecture, API, install, operations, limits)","Multi-tier tests present (unit, functional, e2e, Playwright) with composer/npm scripts","Symfony 7/8 stack with Doctrine ORM, Workflow, Messenger, Security","Operational scaffolding (compose, deploy/docker, ops/grafana, ops/alerts)","Static analysis and code quality tooling (phpstan, rector, php-cs-fixer)","Security posture signals (Symfony security-bundle, gitleaks config)"],"risks":["No GitHub Actions or CI workflows detected","Runtime/tooling target PHP 8.4 while environments may vary; ensure alignment","No git tags detected (pre-release posture)","Antora nav/index not detected; report may be orphaned in docs site","Dual Symfony major targets increase test surface and maintenance load"],"next_actions":["Add CI workflows to run phpstan, cs checks, unit/functional/e2e, and Playwright on PRs","Add CI step to run gitleaks and composer audit, and publish artifacts/reports","Introduce release tagging and changelog automation; publish RC builds","Validate and enforce PHP 8.4 runtime in CI containers; document matrix if needed","Wire the Antora report into site navigation so it’s discoverable","Optionally publish container images from compose/Docker tooling for consistent runtime"],"notes":["Assessment grounded on repo tree, composer/npm scripts, and the component’s embedded report","Branch master at 262dc205f1237c2578ed6fb1f576d740e827d273 with no exact tag","Tooling directories and docs indicate strong local governance despite missing hosted CI","Scores retain pre-RC contour with a small ops/overall adjustment for CI visibility"],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["README.md","docs/ARCHITECTURE.md","docs/API.md","docs/INSTALL.md","docs/OPERATIONS.md","docs/LIMITS.md","docs/PROOF_PACK.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/paying/report/index.adoc","composer.json","package.json","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist","tests/Unit","tests/Functional","tests/E2E","tests/Playwright","public/index.php","config/services.yaml","Migrations","compose.yml","deploy/docker",".gitleaks.toml","ops/grafana","ops/alerts"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":null,"ops":8.9,"market":null,"overall":8.9},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"The component’s product identity as an internal payment lifecycle and operations platform is clearly articulated and well-documented.","risks":["Reads primarily as an internal platform layer; external productization and packaging signals are limited"],"improvements":["Tighten public-facing positioning and usage narratives in README and docs/API.md for non-internal consumers"],"evidence":["README.md","docs/API.md","docs/LIMITS.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/paying/report/index.adoc"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Symfony-first architecture with Doctrine ORM, Workflow, Messenger, and clear interfaces suggests a governed, modular domain shape.","risks":["Supporting Symfony ^7.1 || ^8.0 increases compatibility and test matrix complexity"],"improvements":["Document key bounded contexts and interface contracts in docs/architecture to aid contributor onboarding"],"evidence":["composer.json","docs/ARCHITECTURE.md","src/ServiceInterface","src/InfrastructureInterface","src/RepositoryInterface","Migrations"]},"runtime":{"summary":"A real application surface is present (public/index.php, config, compose) with operational docs and scripts indicating runnable environments.","risks":["Declared PHP 8.4 platform may diverge from some environments; ensure runtime parity in automation"],"improvements":["Provide a documented, reproducible container image and compose flow used in CI and local runs"],"evidence":["public/index.php","config","compose.yml","docs/OPERATIONS.md","composer.json"]},"qa":{"summary":"Multi-tier testing (unit, functional, e2e, Playwright) and static analysis are wired via composer/npm with strong local QA posture.","risks":["Lack of hosted CI may limit consistent execution of the full test matrix on PRs"],"improvements":["Introduce CI pipelines to run phpunit suites, Panther/Playwright e2e, and phpstan on every change"],"evidence":["tests/Unit","tests/Functional","tests/E2E","tests/Playwright","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon","composer.json","package.json","docs/qa"]},"ops":{"summary":"Operational readiness is signaled by compose, docker deploy assets, ops dashboards/alerts, and governance docs, though hosted CI is absent.","risks":["No .github/workflows detected; delivery and release automation likely manual"],"improvements":["Add CI workflows for build/test/scan, and automate release tagging and artifact publication"],"evidence":["compose.yml","deploy/docker","ops/grafana","ops/alerts","docs/OPERATIONS.md",".gitleaks.toml","docs/PROOF_PACK.md"]},"market":{"summary":"Positioning aligns with an enterprise payment lifecycle/operations capability suitable for internal ecosystem reuse.","risks":["Market-facing packaging and external adoption signals are limited in-repo"],"improvements":["Expand docs with integration recipes and provider matrices to clarify fit for external consumers"],"evidence":["README.md",".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/paying/report/index.adoc","docs/API.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Pre-RC maturity is evident across docs, architecture, runtime, QA, and ops tooling; the main gap is visible CI/CD automation.","risks":["Missing hosted CI and release automation can slow RC hardening and confidence"],"improvements":["Stand up CI/CD with tests, static analysis, security scans, and tagged releases to close the RC gap"],"evidence":[".antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/paying/report/index.adoc","composer.json","phpstan.neon","phpunit.xml.dist","tests","compose.yml",".gitleaks.toml"]}}}
